intro: Apium graveolens elixir, also known as celery seed elixir, is a herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The elixir is typically made by infusing the seeds of the Apium graveolens plant, also known as wild celery, in a carrier oil or spirit. Some proponents of the elixir claim that it has antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues.
